contents.contentData: Seeking an Administrative Assistant position with a company that will allow me to fully utilize my communication, organizational, and problem solving skills.

Desire a position as a Finance Manager, where I may employ expertise in reducing financial risk to the company and maintaining a positive image of the company.

An efficient problem solver with a complete range of accounting and office management experience, brilliant customer relationships skills, seeking a position of administrative assistant in reputed organization to enhance my abilities.
